initError.title: Configuration Initialization Failed
initError.hint: The configuration system failed to start properly, some settings may not be saved. Please check disk permissions or delete global-settings.json and restart.

generalTab.noSchemaDesc: Please add the corresponding JSON configuration file in the schemas directory

duckdbTab.title: DuckDB Federated Query Acceleration
duckdbTab.description: Cache remote database data to local DuckDB and leverage DuckDB's analytical query engine to significantly improve complex query performance. Suitable for data exploration, BI analysis, and complex aggregation scenarios.
duckdbTab.enableHint: When enabled, query results will be automatically cached to local DuckDB, and subsequent queries can directly use the cached data
duckdbTab.manualHint: Manually trigger caching, suitable for scenarios where data does not change frequently
duckdbTab.autoHint: Automatically cache after query, suitable for most scenarios (Recommended)
duckdbTab.smartHint: Automatically decide whether to cache based on query frequency, suitable for complex scenarios

networkTab.directConnect: No protocol hops added — direct connection mode
networkTab.sslLocked: SSL is fixed at the end
networkTab.chainDesc: Supports arbitrary SSH/Proxy interleaving (max 4 network hops). SSL/TLS fixed at the end — stream encryption wrapper, counts as 0 network hops, not included in hop limit. Drag to reorder data flow order. Latency warning shown for 3+ hops.
networkTab.fileDbHint: File databases do not require network configuration
networkTab.fileDbHintDesc: SQLite / DuckDB are local file databases. Data is stored in the local file system and does not require SSH tunneling, SSL, or proxy configuration. Configure the database file path in the General tab.

capabilitiesTab.desc: Driver capability matrix: dynamically shows features supported by the current driver. Different drivers provide different capabilities.

driverPropsTab.desc: Driver properties: extensible key-value configuration. Different drivers expose different tunable parameters.
driverPropsTab.noProperties: No additional properties for this driver

advancedTab.accelDesc: Accelerate {dbType} query results via local DuckDB instance. Query data is automatically synced to local DuckDB, federated queries, cross-database JOINs, and aggregations run at local speed.

resultPanel.title: Result Set
resultPanel.sqlFilterPlaceholder:
Enter WHERE condition, subqueries allowed
Example: ArtistId IN (SELECT id FROM artists)
resultPanel.duckdbPlaceholder:
Enter DuckDB SQL analysis statement
Use {table} or result_temp to reference temp table
resultPanel.quickFilterPlaceholder: Enter filter expression, e.g. Title LIKE '%Rock%'
resultPanel.filterResult: {total} rows in memory → {filtered} rows after filter
resultPanel.clickColumnHeader: Click column header to view insights
resultPanel.multiColumnHint: Execute SQL query to enable multi-column analysis

settings.title: Settings
settings.saveFailed: Failed to save settings, please retry
settings.nullDisplayHint: Text to display for NULL values
settings.shortcutInfo: Current shortcuts are for reference only, custom keybindings will be supported in a future release
settings.enableLazyLoadHint: Only load visible content to reduce memory usage

sqlEditor.title: SQL Editor
sqlEditor.transpileHint: Convert current SQL to target dialect:
sqlEditor.noConnection: Please select a database connection first
sqlEditor.connectionFailed: Unable to connect to database, please check connection settings
sqlEditor.transpileSame: Transpiled SQL is identical to original
sqlEditor.transpileFailed: Transpile failed, please check SQL syntax
sqlEditor.draftRestored: Restored unsaved content from last session
sqlEditor.paramHint: Provide values for the following placeholders:

navigator.title: Database Navigator
navigator.clickNewConnection: Click the button above to create a new connection
navigator.selectSaveLocation: Please select at least one save location (global or project)
navigator.noOpenProject: No open project, skipping project connection save
navigator.name: Name
navigator.addStagingEntry: Add new data source to staging area
navigator.noStagingHint: Click + to add a data source
navigator.nativeDriverHint: Built-in driver — zero dependency, ready to use
navigator.externalDriverHint: External driver — requires driver file installation
navigator.fileDbHint: File database — data stored in local file system
navigator.networkDbHint: Network database — connect via TCP/IP to remote server
navigator.selectDbTypeFirstHint: Select a database type on the left to start configuration
navigator.selectDbTypeHint: Select a database type from the left
navigator.advancedDuckHint: Local DuckDB instance as a federation query acceleration layer, automatically caching cross-source intermediate results
navigator.sslTailHint: SSL is always at the chain end (stream encryption wrapper)
navigator.sectionBastionHint: Configure bastion host, username and authentication
navigator.sectionPortForwardHint: Map local port to remote target address
navigator.noAuthConfigs: No auth configs. Click the button above to create one.
navigator.newDbFilePrompt:
New database file
Enter file path (reuses existing, auto-creates if missing):
navigator.customOneTime: One-time custom — not saved as profile

validation.nameRequired: Data source name cannot be empty

workbench.maximizeTooltip: Maximize (fills center area, more effective with multiple groups)
workbench.selectColumnsToGenerate: Select data columns to generate chart
workbench.browseObjects: Browse database objects and table structures
workbench.selectTableToView: Please select a table to view
workbench.selectColumnsAndRule: Select columns and rules to execute analysis
workbench.auxiliaryPanelDesc: SQL history, column insights and more will appear here
workbench.panelTip: Tip: Click activity bar icons to switch panels
workbench.selectDbObjectToStart: Select a database object from the left sidebar to start
workbench.duckdbLocalEngine: Local acceleration engine based on DuckDB
workbench.maxConnectionsHint: Control the maximum number of concurrent database connections
workbench.minIdleConnectionsHint: Minimum number of idle connections to maintain
workbench.idleTimeoutHint: Time before idle connections are automatically released
workbench.autoReconnectHint: Automatically attempt to reconnect when connection drops
workbench.maxHistoryItemsHint: Maximum number of history items to retain
workbench.retentionDaysHint: Number of days to retain history
workbench.includeSQLHint: Include executed SQL statements in history
workbench.enableMonitoringHint: Monitor database connections and system status
workbench.enableAlertsHint: Send notifications when connection status changes
workbench.alertOnSlowQueryHint: Alert when query execution exceeds threshold
workbench.slowQueryThresholdHint: Queries exceeding this time are considered slow
workbench.compactModeHint: Reduce component spacing for a more compact layout
workbench.confirmClearHistory: Are you sure you want to clear all history?
workbench.noRecentProjectsHint: Click [+ New Project] to create your first project or [Open Existing Project] to import one
workbench.deleteProjectWarning: This action cannot be undone! This will permanently delete the project directory and all data:
workbench.deleteProjectInputHint: Please enter the project name to confirm deletion

analytics.defaultSortFieldDesc: Default sort field for resource list
analytics.showScopeTagDesc: Display scope tags in resource list
analytics.showMetadataDesc: Show row count, column count, file size, etc.
analytics.enableVirtualScrollDesc: Enable virtual scroll for large datasets
analytics.enableQueryCacheDesc: Cache query results for faster response

analyticsResource.title: Analytics Resource Manager
analyticsResource.name: Name
analyticsResource.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this resource?
analyticsResource.batchDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected resources?

analyticsResource.permanentDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete resource "{name}"? This action cannot be undone!

scratchpad.title: Scratchpad
scratchpad.dialogNotAvailable: File dialog not available, check Tauri config
scratchpad.noReferences: No external references, click the link icon to add
scratchpad.emptyTrashConfirm: Are you sure you want to empty the trash? This action cannot be undone.
scratchpad.promoteToResourceConfirm: Promote "{name}" to analytics resource? It will appear in the resource manager.
scratchpad.saveAllHint: Use editor shortcuts to save individual files
scratchpad.emptyScratchpadHint: Create a new file or drop files here to get started
scratchpad.noProjectHint: Open or create a project to start using the scratchpad
scratchpad.cutFileHint: Cut item, select target folder and paste to move
scratchpad.paneviewSelectFile: Select a file to preview content
scratchpad.conflictMessage2: The editor has unsaved changes. Reloading will lose unsaved content.

sqlToolbar.deleteProjectWarning: This action cannot be undone! Will permanently delete the project directory and all data:
sqlToolbar.deleteProjectInputHint: Please enter the project name to confirm deletion
sqlToolbar.noRecentProjectsHint: Click [+ New Project] to create your first project or [Open Existing Project] to import one

common.notValidProject: The selected path is not a valid project folder. Please ensure it contains project data files.
common.invalidProjectFolderDesc: The folder you selected is not a valid project directory. Please select a folder that contains project data files, or create a new project.
